title: User asks for the source quotation that a PO was created from
user_persona: Buyer reconciling supplier pricing vs the original quote

conversation.user: PO-2026-1300 was created from a quotation. Which one, and show me the quote pricing.

bot_must: read its source reference field — if created via PoCrtQtn, the quotation_no will be in the PO header
cross-module read to PQ module for quotation_no details
return quote details: quote number, supplier, lines, prices, validity

conversation.user: Are the PO line prices the same as the quote?

bot_must: compare line-by-line: PO cost vs Quote price

evaluation_metrics.source_lineage_followed: PO → quotation reference followed to PQ module
